enabled.description: Whether to allow access to the SCIM API for user and group management

allOf.description: The hash of the token

token.description: Token to authenticate with the SCIM API

scim.description: Configuration for System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) support

accessTokenLifespan.description: The maximum time before an access token is expired (in minutes), default is 10 minutes

ssoSessionIdleTimeout.description: The time a login session is allowed to be idle before it expires (in minutes), default is 4 days (5760 minutes)

ssoSessionMaxLifespan.description: The maximum time before a login session is expired (in minutes), default is 30 days (43200 minutes)

timeouts.description: Timeouts you can specify for user logins in Gradle Enterprise

auth.description: Configuration of Gradle Enterprise authentication options

backupsToRetain.description: How many old backups to keep

emailNotification.description: Send an email when backup is complete

dayOfWeek.description: Day (in UTC) to perform the backup

Custom cron expression for backup time

allowUntrustedNodeSsl.description: Allow communication with nodes running over untrusted SSL

buildCache.description: Configuration specific to the build cache app

autoDeleteWhileFreeSpaceLessThanPercenta.description: Threshold of free disk space before old scans will be automatically deleted

rejectIncomingWhileFreeSpaceLessThanPerc.description: Threshold of free disk space before new scans will be rejected

sendWarningEmailWhenFreeSpaceLessThanPer.description: Threshold of free disk space before a warning is sent to users publishing a build scan

keepDays.description: How many days of scans should be retained

bucket.description: The name of the bucket to store the scan payloads

buildScans.description: Configuration specific to the build scans app

excludedHosts.description: A list of hosts that should not be proxied
